description: This pipeline applies a morphological operation to an image, followed by generating a look-up table from two colors, effectively creating a customized color mapping without altering the original pixel data.

1603d058-02f8-4ded-9b8f-7959e5ad935c.name: ij1-set-lut-from-colors
1603d058-02f8-4ded-9b8f-7959e5ad935c.description: Generates a LUT from the first to the second color. This does not change the pixel data.

9224bad4-6b8c-450d-9810-79baf49c826e.name: ij1-morph-operation2d
9224bad4-6b8c-450d-9810-79baf49c826e.description:
Applies a morphological operation to greyscale images. Following operations are included: Erosion, Dilation, Opening, Closing, White Top Hat, Black Top Hat, Gradient, Laplacian, Internal Gradient, and External Gradient. More information (including examples) can be found at https://imagej.net/MorphoLibJ.html
If a multi-channel image is provided, the operation is applied to each channel. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.
